    parser.state = S.ATTRIB;\n\t\t          }\n\t\t          continue\n\n\t\t        case S.ATTRIB:\n\t\t          // haven't read the attribute name yet.\n\t\t          if (isWhitespace(c)) {\n\t\t            continue\n\t\t          } else if (c === '>') {\n\t\t            openTag(parser);\n\t\t          } else if (c === '/') {\n\t\t            parser.state = S.OPEN_TAG_SLASH;\n\t\t          } else if (isMatch(nameStart, c)) {\n\t\t            parser.attribName = c;\n\t\t            parser.attribValue = '';\n\t\t            parser.state = S.ATTRIB_NAME;\n\t\t          } else {\n\t\t            strictFail(parser, 'Invalid attribute name');\n\t\t          }\n\t\t          continue\n\n\t\t        case S.ATTRIB_NAME:\n\t\t          if (c === '=') {\n\t\t            parser.state = S.ATTRIB_VALUE;\n\t\t          } else if (c === '>') {\n\t\t            strictFail(parser, 'Attribute without value');\n\t\t            parser.attribValue = parser.attribName;\n\t\t            attrib(parser);\n\t\t            openTag(parser);\n\t\t          } else if (isWhitespace(c)) {\n\t\t            parser.state = S.ATTRIB_NAME_SAW_WHITE;\n\t\t          } else if (isMatch(nameBody, c)) {\n\t\t            parser.attribName += c;\n\t\t          } else {\n\t\t            strictFail(parser, 'Invalid attribute name');\n\t\t          }\n\t\t          continue\n\n\t\t        case S.ATTRIB_NAME_SAW_WHITE:\n\t\t          if (c === '=') {\n\t\t            parser.state = S.ATTRIB_VALUE;\n\t\t          } else if (isWhitespace(c)) {\n\t\t            continue\n\t\t          } else {\n\t\t            strictFail(parser, 'Attribute without value');\n\t\t            parser.tag.attributes[parser.attribName] = '';\n\t\t            parser.attribValue = '';\n\t\t            emitNode(parser, 'onattribute', {\n\t\t              name: parser.attribName,\n\t\t              value: ''\n\t\t            });\n\t\t            parser.attribName = '';\n\t\t            if (c === '>') {\n\t\t              openTag(parser);\n\t\t            } else if (isMatch(nameStart, c)) {\n\t\t              parser.attribName = c;\n\t\t              parser.state = S.ATTRIB_NAME;\n\t\t            } else {\n\t\t              strictFail(parser, 'Invalid attribute name');\n\t\t              parser.state = S.ATTRIB;\n\t\t            }\n\t\t          }\n\t\t          continue\n\n\t\t        case S.ATTRIB_VALUE:\n\t\t          if (isWhitespace(c)) {\n\t\t            continue\n\t\t          } else if (isQuote(c)) {\n\t\t            parser.q = c;\n\t\t            parser.state = S.ATTRIB_VALUE_QUOTED;\n\t\t          } else {\n\t\t            if (!parser.opt.unquotedAttributeValues) {\n\t\t              error(parser, 'Unquoted attribute value');\n\t\t            }\n\t\t            parser.state = S.ATTRIB_VALUE_UNQUOTED;\n\t\t            parser.attribValue = c;\n\t\t          }\n\t\t          continue\n\n\t\t        case S.ATTRIB_VALUE_QUOTED:\n\t\t          if (c !== parser.q) {\n\t\t            if (c === '&') {\n\t\t              parser.state = S.ATTRIB_VALUE_ENTITY_Q;\n\t\t            } else {\n\t\t              parser.attribValue += c;\n\t\t            }\n\t\t            continue\n\t\t          }\n\t\t          attrib(parser);\n\t\t          parser.q = '';\n\t\t          parser.state = S.ATTRIB_VALUE_CLOSED;\n\t\t          continue\n\n\t\t        case S.ATTRIB_VALUE_CLOSED:\n\t\t          if (isWhitespace(c)) {\n\t\t            parser.state = S.ATTRIB;\n\t\t          } else if (c === '>') {\n\t\t            openTag(parser);\n\t\t          } else if (c === '/') {\n\t\t            parser.state = S.OPEN_TAG_SLASH;\n\t\t          } else if (isMatch(nameStart, c)) {\n\t\t            strictFail(parser, 'No whitespace between attributes');\n\t\t            parser.attribName = c;\n\t\t            parser.attribValue = '';\n\t\t            parser.state = S.ATTRIB_NAME;\n\t\t          } else {\n\t\t            strictFail(parser, 'Invalid attribute name');\n\t\t          }\n\t\t          continue\n\n\t\t        case S.ATTRIB_VALUE_UNQUOTED:\n\t\t          if (!isAttribEnd(c)) {\n\t\t            if (c === '&') {\n\t\t              parser.state = S.ATTRIB_VALUE_ENTITY_U;\n\t\t            } else {\n\t\t              parser.attribValue += c;\n\t\t            }\n\t\t            continue\n\t\t          }\n\t\t          attrib(parser);\n\t\t          if (c === '>') {\n\t\t            openTag(parser);\n\t\t          } else {\n\t\t            parser.state = S.ATTRIB;\n\t\t          }\n\t\t          continue\n\n\t\t        case S.CLOSE_TAG:\n\t\t          if (!parser.tagName) {\n\t\t            if (isWhitespace(c)) {\n\t\t              continue\n\t\t            } else if (notMatch(nameStart, c)) {\n\t\t              if (parser.script) {\n\t\t                parser.script += '</' + c;\n\t\t                parser.state = S.SCRIPT;\n\t\t              } else {\n\t\t                strictFail(parser, 'Invalid tagname in closing tag.');\n\t\t              }\n\t\t            } else {\n\t\t              parser.tagName = c;\n\t\t            }\n\t\t          } else if (c === '>') {\n\t\t            closeTag(parser);\n\t\t          } else if (isMatch(nameBody, c)) {\n\t\t            parser.tagName += c;\n\t\t          } else if (parser.script) {\n\t\t            parser.script += '</' + parser.tagName;\n\t\t            parser.tagName = '';\n\t\t            parser.state = S.SCRIPT;\n\t\t          } else {\n\t\t            if (!isWhitespace(c)) {\n\t\t              strictFail(parser, 'Invalid tagname in closing tag');\n\t\t            }\n\t\t            parser.state = S.CLOSE_TAG_SAW_WHITE;\n\t\t          }\n\t\t          continue\n\n\t\t        case S.CLOSE_TAG_SAW_WHITE:\n\t\t          if (isWhitespace(c)) {\n\t\t            continue\n\t\t          }\n\t\t          if (c === '>') {\n\t\t            closeTag(parser);\n\t\t          } else {\n\t\t            strictFail(parser, 'Invalid characters in closing tag');\n\t\t          }\n\t\t          continue\n\n\t\t        case S.TEXT_ENTITY:\n\t\t        case S.ATTRIB_VALUE_ENTITY_Q:\n\t\t        case S.ATTRIB_VALUE_ENTITY_U:\n\t\t          var returnState;\n\t\t          var buffer;\n\t\t          switch (parser.state) {\n\t\t            case S.TEXT_ENTITY:\n\t\t              returnState = S.TEXT;\n\t\t              buffer = 'textNode';\n\t\t              break\n\n\t\t            case S.ATTRIB_VALUE_ENTITY_Q:\n\t\t              returnState = S.ATTRIB_VALUE_QUOTED;\n\t\t              buffer = 'attribValue';\n\t\t              break\n\n\t\t            case S.ATTRIB_VALUE_ENTITY_U:\n\t\t              returnState = S.ATTRIB_VALUE_UNQUOTED;\n\t\t              buffer = 'attribValue';\n\t\t              break\n\t\t          }\n\n\t\t          if (c === ';') {\n\t\t            var parsedEntity = parseEntity(parser);\n\t\t            if (parser.opt.unparsedEntities && !Object.values(sax.XML_ENTITIES).includes(parsedEntity)) {\n\t\t              parser.entity = '';\n\t\t              parser.state = returnState;\n\t\t              parser.write(parsedEntity);\n\t\t            } else {\n\t\t              parser[buffer] += parsedEntity;\n\t\t              parser.entity = '';\n\t\t              parser.state = returnState;\n\t\t            }\n\t\t          } else if (isMatch(parser.entity.length ? entityBody : entityStart, c)) {\n\t\t            parser.entity += c;\n\t\t          } else {\n\t\t            strictFail(parser, 'Invalid character in entity name');\n\t\t            parser[buffer] += '&' + parser.entity + c;\n\t\t            parser.entity = '';\n\t\t            parser.state = returnState;\n\t\t          }\n\n\t\t          continue\n\n\t\t        default: /* istanbul ignore next */ {\n\t\t          throw new Error(parser, 'Unknown state: ' + parser.state)\n\t\t        }\n\t\t      }\n\t\t    } // while\n\n\t\t    if (parser.position >= parser.bufferCheckPosition) {\n\t\t      checkBufferLength(parser);\n\t\t    }\n\t\t    return parser\n\t\t  }\n\n\t\t  /*! http://mths.be/fromcodepoint v0.1.0 by @mathias */\n\t\t  /* istanbul ignore next */\n\t\t  if (!String.fromCodePoint) {\n\t\t    (function () {\n\t\t      var stringFromCharCode = String.fromCharCode;\n\t\t      var floor = Math.floor;\n\t\t      var fromCodePoint = function () {\n\t\t        var MAX_SIZE = 0x4000;\n\t\t        var codeUnits = [];\n\t\t        var highSurrogate;\n\t\t        var lowSurrogate;\n\t\t        var index = -1;\n\t\t        var length = arguments.length;\n\t\t        if (!length) {\n\t\t          return ''\n\t\t        }\n\t\t        var result = '';\n\t\t        while (++index < length) {\n\t\t          var codePoint = Number(arguments[index]);\n\t\t          if (\n\t\t            !isFinite(codePoint) || // `NaN`, `+Infinity`, or `-Infinity`\n\t\t            codePoint < 0 || // not a valid Unicode code point\n\t\t            codePoint > 0x10FFFF || // not a valid Unicode code point\n\t\t            floor(codePoint) !== codePoint // not an integer\n\t\t          ) {\n\t\t            throw RangeError('Invalid code point: ' + codePoint)\n\t\t          }\n\t\t          if (codePoint <= 0xFFFF) { // BMP code point\n\t\t            codeUnits.push(codePoint);\n\t\t          } else { // Astral code point; split in surrogate halves\n\t\t            // http://mathiasbynens.be/notes/javascript-encoding#surrogate-formulae\n\t\t            codePoint -= 0x10000;\n\t\t            highSurrogate = (codePoint >> 10) + 0xD800;\n\t\t            lowSurrogate = (codePoint % 0x400) + 0xDC00;\n\t\t            codeUnits.push(highSurrogate, lowSurrogate);\n\t\t          }\n\t\t          if (index + 1 === length || codeUnits.length > MAX_SIZE) {\n\t\t            result += stringFromCharCode.apply(null, codeUnits);\n\t\t            codeUnits.length = 0;\n\t\t          }\n\t\t        }\n\t\t        return result\n\t\t      };\n\t\t      /* istanbul ignore next */\n\t\t      if (Object.defineProperty) {\n\t\t        Object.defineProperty(String, 'fromCodePoint', {\n\t\t          value: fromCodePoint,\n\t\t          configurable: true,\n\t\t          writable: true\n\t\t        });\n\t\t      } else {\n\t\t        String.fromCodePoint = fromCodePoint;\n\t\t      }\n\t\t    }());\n\t\t  }\n\t\t})(exports); \n\t} (sax));\n\treturn sax;\n}\n\nvar arrayHelper;\nvar hasRequiredArrayHelper;\n\nfunction requireArrayHelper () {\n\tif (hasRequiredArrayHelper) return arrayHelper;\n\thasRequiredArrayHelper = 1;\n\tarrayHelper = {\r\n\r\n\t  isArray: function(value) {\r\n\t    if (Array.isArray) {\r\n\t      return Array.isArray(value);\r\n\t    }\r\n\t    // fallback for older browsers like  IE 8\r\n\t    return Object.prototype.toString.call( value ) === '[object Array]';\r\n\t  }\r\n\r\n\t};\n\treturn arrayHelper;\n}\n\nvar optionsHelper;\nvar hasRequiredOptionsHelper;\n\nfunction requireOptionsHelper () {\n\tif (hasRequiredOptionsHelper) return optionsHelper;\n\thasRequiredOptionsHelper = 1;\n\tvar isArray = requireArrayHelper().isArray;\r\n\r\n\toptionsHelper = {\r\n\r\n\t  copyOptions: function (options) {\r\n\t    var key, copy = {};\r\n\t    for (key in options) {\r\n\t      if (options.hasOwnProperty(key)) {\r\n\t        copy[key] = options[key];\r\n\t      }\r\n\t    }\r\n\t    return copy;\r\n\t  },\r\n\r\n\t  ensureFlagExists: function (item, options) {\r\n\t    if (!(item in options) || typeof options[item] !== 'boolean') {\r\n\t      options[item] = false;\r\n\t    }\r\n\t  },\r\n\r\n\t  ensureSpacesExists: function (options) {\r\n\t    if (!('spaces' in options) || (typeof options.spaces !== 'number' && typeof options.spaces !== 'string')) {\r\n\t      options.spaces = 0;\r\n\t    }\r\n\t  },\r\n\r\n\t  ensureAlwaysArrayExists: function (options) {\r\n\t    if (!('alwaysArray' in options) || (typeof options.alwaysArray !== 'boolean' && !isArray(options.alwaysArray))) {\r\n\t      options.alwaysArray = false;\r\n\t    }\r\n\t  },\r\n\r\n\t  ensureKeyExists: function (key, options) {\r\n\t    if (!(key + 'Key' in options) || typeof options[key + 'Key'] !== 'string') {\r\n\t      options[key + 'Key'] = options.compact ? '_' + key : key;\r\n\t    }\r\n\t  },\r\n\r\n\t  checkFnExists: function (key, options) {\r\n\t    return key + 'Fn' in options;\r\n\t  }\r\n\r\n\t};\n\treturn optionsHelper;\n}\n\nvar xml2js;\nvar hasRequiredXml2js;\n\nfunction requireXml2js () {\n\tif (hasRequiredXml2js) return xml2js;\n\thasRequiredXml2js = 1;\n\tvar sax = requireSax();\r\n\tvar helper = requireOptionsHelper();\r\n\tvar isArray = requireArrayHelper().isArray;\r\n\r\n\tvar options;\r\n\tvar currentElement;\r\n\r\n\tfunction validateOptions(userOptions) {\r\n\t  options = helper.copyOptions(userOptions);\r\n\t  helper.ensureFlagExists('ignoreDeclaration', options);\r\n\t  helper.ensureFlagExists('ignoreInstruction', options);\r\n\t  helper.ensureFlagExists('ignoreAttributes', options);\r\n\t  helper.ensureFlagExists('ignoreText', options);\r\n\t  helper.ensureFlagExists('ignoreComment', options);\r\n\t  helper.ensureFlagExists('ignoreCdata', options);\r\n\t  helper.ensureFlagExists('ignoreDoctype', options);\r\n\t  helper.ensureFlagExists('compact', options);\r\n\t  helper.ensureFlagExists('alwaysChildren', options);\r\n\t  helper.ensureFlagExists('addParent', options);\r\n\t  helper.ensureFlagExists('trim', options);\r\n\t  helper.ensureFlagExists('nativeType', options);\r\n\t  helper.ensureFlagExists('nativeTypeAttributes', options);\r\n\t  helper.ensureFlagExists('sanitize', options);\r\n\t  helper.ensureFlagExists('instructionHasAttributes', options);\r\n\t  helper.ensureFlagExists('captureSpacesBetweenElements', options);\r\n\t  helper.ensureAlwaysArrayExists(options);\r\n\t  helper.ensureKeyExists('declaration', options);\r\n\t  helper.ensureKeyExists('instruction', options);\r\n\t  helper.ensureKeyExists('attributes', options);\r\n\t  helper.ensureKeyExists('text', options);\r\n\t  helper.ensureKeyExists('comment', options);\r\n\t  helper.ensureKeyExists('cdata', options);\r\n\t  helper.ensureKeyExists('doctype', options);\r\n\t  helper.ensureKeyExists('type', options);\r\n\t  helper.ensureKeyExists('name', options);\r\n\t  helper.ensureKeyExists('elements', options);\r\n\t  helper.ensureKeyExists('parent', options);\r\n\t  helper.checkFnExists('doctype', options);\r\n\t  helper.checkFnExists('instruction', options);\r\n\t  helper.checkFnExists('cdata', options);\r\n\t  helper.checkFnExists('comment', options);\r\n\t  helper.checkFnExists('text', options);\r\n\t  helper.checkFnExists('instructionName', options);\r\n\t  helper.checkFnExists('elementName', options);\r\n\t  helper.checkFnExists('attributeName', options);\r\n\t  helper.checkFnExists('attributeValue', options);\r\n\t  helper.checkFnExists('attributes', options);\r\n\t  return options;\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tfunction nativeType(value) {\r\n\t  var nValue = Number(value);\r\n\t  if (!isNaN(nValue)) {\r\n\t    return nValue;\r\n\t  }\r\n\t  var bValue = value.toLowerCase();\r\n\t  if (bValue === 'true') {\r\n\t    return true;\r\n\t  } else if (bValue === 'false') {\r\n\t    return false;\r\n\t  }\r\n\t  return value;\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tfunction addField(type, value) {\r\n\t  var key;\r\n\t  if (options.compact) {\r\n\t    if (\r\n\t      !currentElement[options[type + 'Key']] &&\r\n\t      (isArray(options.alwaysArray) ? options.alwaysArray.indexOf(options[type + 'Key']) !== -1 : options.alwaysArray)\r\n\t    ) {\r\n\t      currentElement[options[type + 'Key']] = [];\r\n\t    }\r\n\t    if (currentElement[options[type + 'Key']] && !isArray(currentElement[options[type + 'Key']])) {\r\n\t      currentElement[options[type + 'Key']] = [currentElement[options[type + 'Key']]];\r\n\t    }\r\n\t    if (type + 'Fn' in options && typeof value === 'string') {\r\n\t      value = options[type + 'Fn'](value, currentElement);\r\n\t    }\r\n\t    if (type === 'instruction' && ('instructionFn' in options || 'instructionNameFn' in options)) {\r\n\t      for (key in value) {\r\n\t        if (value.hasOwnProperty(key)) {\r\n\t          if ('instructionFn' in options) {\r\n\t            value[key] = options.instructionFn(value[key], key, currentElement);\r\n\t          } else {\r\n\t            var temp = value[key];\r\n\t            delete value[key];\r\n\t            value[options.instructionNameFn(key, temp, currentElement)] = temp;\r\n\t          }\r\n\t        }\r\n\t      }\r\n\t    }\r\n\t    if (isArray(currentElement[options[type + 'Key']])) {\r\n\t      currentElement[options[type + 'Key']].push(value);\r\n\t    } else {\r\n\t      currentElement[options[type + 'Key']] = value;\r\n\t    }\r\n\t  } else {\r\n\t    if (!currentElement[options.elementsKey]) {\r\n\t      currentElement[options.elementsKey] = [];\r\n\t    }\r\n\t    var element = {};\r\n\t    element[options.typeKey] = type;\r\n\t    if (type === 'instruction') {\r\n\t      for (key in value) {\r\n\t        if (value.hasOwnProperty(key)) {\r\n\t          break;\r\n\t        }\r\n\t      }\r\n\t      element[options.nameKey] = 'instructionNameFn' in options ? options.instructionNameFn(key, value, currentElement) : key;\r\n\t      if (options.instructionHasAttributes) {\r\n\t        element[options.attributesKey] = value[key][options.attributesKey];\r\n\t        if ('instructionFn' in options) {\r\n\t          element[options.attributesKey] = options.instructionFn(element[options.attributesKey], key, currentElement);\r\n\t        }\r\n\t      } else {\r\n\t        if ('instructionFn' in options) {\r\n\t          value[key] = options.instructionFn(value[key], key, currentElement);\r\n\t        }\r\n\t        element[options.instructionKey] = value[key];\r\n\t      }\r\n\t    } else {\r\n\t      if (type + 'Fn' in options) {\r\n\t        value = options[type + 'Fn'](value, currentElement);\r\n\t      }\r\n\t      element[options[type + 'Key']] = value;\r\n\t    }\r\n\t    if (options.addParent) {\r\n\t      element[options.parentKey] = currentElement;\r\n\t    }\r\n\t    currentElement[options.elementsKey].push(element);\r\n\t  }\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tfunction manipulateAttributes(attributes) {\r\n\t  if ('attributesFn' in options && attributes) {\r\n\t    attributes = options.attributesFn(attributes, currentElement);\r\n\t  }\r\n\t  if ((options.trim || 'attributeValueFn' in options || 'attributeNameFn' in options || options.nativeTypeAttributes) && attributes) {\r\n\t    var key;\r\n\t    for (key in attributes) {\r\n\t      if (attributes.hasOwnProperty(key)) {\r\n\t        if (options.trim) attributes[key] = attributes[key].trim();\r\n\t        if (options.nativeTypeAttributes) {\r\n\t          attributes[key] = nativeType(attributes[key]);\r\n\t        }\r\n\t        if ('attributeValueFn' in options) attributes[key] = options.attributeValueFn(attributes[key], key, currentElement);\r\n\t        if ('attributeNameFn' in options) {\r\n\t          var temp = attributes[key];\r\n\t          delete attributes[key];\r\n\t          attributes[options.attributeNameFn(key, attributes[key], currentElement)] = temp;\r\n\t        }\r\n\t      }\r\n\t    }\r\n\t  }\r\n\t  return attributes;\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tfunction onInstruction(instruction) {\r\n\t  var attributes = {};\r\n\t  if (instruction.body && (instruction.name.toLowerCase() === 'xml' || options.instructionHasAttributes)) {\r\n\t    var attrsRegExp = /([\\w:-]+)\\s*=\\s*(?:\"([^\"]*)\"|'([^']*)'|(\\w+))\\s*/g;\r\n\t    var match;\r\n\t    while ((match = attrsRegExp.exec(instruction.body)) !== null) {\r\n\t      attributes[match[1]] = match[2] || match[3] || match[4];\r\n\t    }\r\n\t    attributes = manipulateAttributes(attributes);\r\n\t  }\r\n\t  if (instruction.name.toLowerCase() === 'xml') {\r\n\t    if (options.ignoreDeclaration) {\r\n\t      return;\r\n\t    }\r\n\t    currentElement[options.declarationKey] = {};\r\n\t    if (Object.keys(attributes).length) {\r\n\t      currentElement[options.declarationKey][options.attributesKey] = attributes;\r\n\t    }\r\n\t    if (options.addParent) {\r\n\t      currentElement[options.declarationKey][options.parentKey] = currentElement;\r\n\t    }\r\n\t  } else {\r\n\t    if (options.ignoreInstruction) {\r\n\t      return;\r\n\t    }\r\n\t    if (options.trim) {\r\n\t      instruction.body = instruction.body.trim();\r\n\t    }\r\n\t    var value = {};\r\n\t    if (options.instructionHasAttributes && Object.keys(attributes).length) {\r\n\t      value[instruction.name] = {};\r\n\t      value[instruction.name][options.attributesKey] = attributes;\r\n\t    } else {\r\n\t      value[instruction.name] = instruction.body;\r\n\t    }\r\n\t    addField('instruction', value);\r\n\t  }\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tfunction onStartElement(name, attributes) {\r\n\t  var element;\r\n\t  if (typeof name === 'object') {\r\n\t    attributes = name.attributes;\r\n\t    name = name.name;\r\n\t  }\r\n\t  attributes = manipulateAttributes(attributes);\r\n\t  if ('elementNameFn' in options) {\r\n\t    name = options.elementNameFn(name, currentElement);\r\n\t  }\r\n\t  if (options.compact) {\r\n\t    element = {};\r\n\t    if (!options.ignoreAttributes && attributes && Object.keys(attributes).length) {\r\n\t      element[options.attributesKey] = {};\r\n\t      var key;\r\n\t      for (key in attributes) {\r\n\t        if (attributes.hasOwnProperty(key)) {\r\n\t          element[options.attributesKey][key] = attributes[key];\r\n\t        }\r\n\t      }\r\n\t    }\r\n\t    if (\r\n\t      !(name in currentElement) &&\r\n\t      (isArray(options.alwaysArray) ? options.alwaysArray.indexOf(name) !== -1 : options.alwaysArray)\r\n\t    ) {\r\n\t      currentElement[name] = [];\r\n\t    }\r\n\t    if (currentElement[name] && !isArray(currentElement[name])) {\r\n\t      currentElement[name] = [currentElement[name]];\r\n\t    }\r\n\t    if (isArray(currentElement[name])) {\r\n\t      currentElement[name].push(element);\r\n\t    } else {\r\n\t      currentElement[name] = element;\r\n\t    }\r\n\t  } else {\r\n\t    if (!currentElement[options.elementsKey]) {\r\n\t      currentElement[options.elementsKey] = [];\r\n\t    }\r\n\t    element = {};\r\n\t    element[options.typeKey] = 'element';\r\n\t    element[options.nameKey] = name;\r\n\t    if (!options.ignoreAttributes && attributes && Object.keys(attributes).length) {\r\n\t      element[options.attributesKey] = attributes;\r\n\t    }\r\n\t    if (options.alwaysChildren) {\r\n\t      element[options.elementsKey] = [];\r\n\t    }\r\n\t    currentElement[options.elementsKey].push(element);\r\n\t  }\r\n\t  element[options.parentKey] = currentElement; // will be deleted in onEndElement() if !options.addParent\r\n\t  currentElement = element;\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tfunction onText(text) {\r\n\t  if (options.ignoreText) {\r\n\t    return;\r\n\t  }\r\n\t  if (!text.trim() && !options.captureSpacesBetweenElements) {\r\n\t    return;\r\n\t  }\r\n\t  if (options.trim) {\r\n\t    text = text.trim();\r\n\t  }\r\n\t  if (options.nativeType) {\r\n\t    text = nativeType(text);\r\n\t  }\r\n\t  if (options.sanitize) {\r\n\t    text = text.replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/>/g, '&gt;');\r\n\t  }\r\n\t  addField('text', text);\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tfunction onComment(comment) {\r\n\t  if (options.ignoreComment) {\r\n\t    return;\r\n\t  }\r\n\t  if (options.trim) {\r\n\t    comment = comment.trim();\r\n\t  }\r\n\t  addField('comment', comment);\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tfunction onEndElement(name) {\r\n\t  var parentElement = currentElement[options.parentKey];\r\n\t  if (!options.addParent) {\r\n\t    delete currentElement[options.parentKey];\r\n\t  }\r\n\t  currentElement = parentElement;\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tfunction onCdata(cdata) {\r\n\t  if (options.ignoreCdata) {\r\n\t    return;\r\n\t  }\r\n\t  if (options.trim) {\r\n\t    cdata = cdata.trim();\r\n\t  }\r\n\t  addField('cdata', cdata);\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tfunction onDoctype(doctype) {\r\n\t  if (options.ignoreDoctype) {\r\n\t    return;\r\n\t  }\r\n\t  doctype = doctype.replace(/^ /, '');\r\n\t  if (options.trim) {\r\n\t    doctype = doctype.trim();\r\n\t  }\r\n\t  addField('doctype', doctype);\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\tfunction onError(error) {\r\n\t  error.note = error; //console.error(error);\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\txml2js = function (xml, userOptions) {\r\n\r\n\t  var parser = sax.parser(true, {}) ;\r\n\t  var result = {};\r\n\t  currentElement = result;\r\n\r\n\t  options = validateOptions(userOptions);\r\n\r\n\t  {\r\n\t    parser.opt = {strictEntities: true};\r\n\t    parser.onopentag = onStartElement;\r\n\t    parser.ontext = onText;\r\n\t    parser.oncomment = onComment;\r\n\t    parser.onclosetag = onEndElement;\r\n\t    parser.onerror = onError;\r\n\t    parser.oncdata = onCdata;\r\n\t    parser.ondoctype = onDoctype;\r\n\t    parser.onprocessinginstruction = onInstruction;\r\n\t  }\r\n\r\n\t  {\r\n\t    parser.write(xml).close();\r\n\t  }\r\n\r\n\t  if (result[options.elementsKey]) {\r\n\t    var temp = result[options.elementsKey];\r\n\t    delete result[options.elementsKey];\r\n\t    result[options.elementsKey] = temp;\r\n\t    delete result.text;\r\n\t  }\r\n\r\n\t  return result;\r\n\r\n\t};\n\treturn xml2js;\n}\n\nvar xml2json;\nvar hasRequiredXml2json;\n\nfunction requireXml2json () {\n\tif (hasRequiredXml2json) return xml2json;\n\thasRequiredXml2json = 1;\n\tvar helper = requireOptionsHelper();\r\n\tvar xml2js = requireXml2js();\r\n\r\n\tfunction validateOptions (userOptions) {\r\n\t  var options = helper.copyOptions(userOptions);\r\n\t  helper.ensureSpacesExists(options);\r\n\t  return options;\r\n\t}\r\n\r\n\txml2json = function(xml, userOptions) {\r\n\t  var options, js, json, parentKey;\r\n\t  options = validateOptions(userOptions);\r\n\t  js = xml2js(xml, options);\r\n\t  parentKey = 'compact' in options && options.compact ? '_parent' : 'parent';\r\n\t  // parentKey = ptions.compact ? '_parent' : 'parent'; // consider this\r\n\t  if ('addParent' in options && options.addParent) {\r\n\t    json = JSON.stringify(js, function (k, v) { return k === parentKey? '_' : v; }, options.spaces);\r\n\t  } else {\r\n\t    json = JSON.stringify(js, null, options.spaces);\r\n\t  }\r\n\t  return json.replace(/\\u2028/g, '\\\\u2028').replace(/\\u2029/g, '\\\\u2029');\r\n\t};\n\treturn xml2json;\n}\n\nvar js2xml;\nvar hasRequiredJs2xml;\n\nfunction requireJs2xml () {\n\tif (hasRequiredJs2xml) return js2xml;\n\thasRequiredJs2xml = 1;\n\tvar helper = requireOptionsHelper();\n\tvar isArray = requireArrayHelper().isArray;\n\n\tvar currentElement, currentElementName;\n\n\tfunction validateOptions(userOptions) {\n\t  var options = helper.copyOptions(userOptions);\n\t  helper.ensureFlagExists('ignoreDeclaration', options);\n\t  helper.ensureFlagExists('ignoreInstruction', options);\n\t  helper.ensureFlagExists('ignoreAttributes', options);\n\t  helper.ensureFlagExists('ignoreText', options);\n\t  helper.ensureFlagExists('ignoreComment', options);\n\t  helper.ensureFlagExists('ignoreCdata', options);\n\t  helper.ensureFlagExists('ignoreDoctype', options);\n\t  helper.ensureFlagExists('compact', options);\n\t  helper.ensureFlagExists('indentText', options);\n\t  helper.ensureFlagExists('indentCdata', options);\n\t  helper.ensureFlagExists('indentAttributes', options);\n\t  helper.ensureFlagExists('indentInstruction', options);\n\t  helper.ensureFlagExists('fullTagEmptyElement', options);\n\t  helper.ensureFlagExists('noQuotesForNativeAttributes', options);\n\t  helper.ensureSpacesExists(options);\n\t  if (typeof options.spaces === 'number') {\n\t    options.spaces = Array(options.spaces + 1).join(' ');\n\t  }\n\t  helper.ensureKeyExists('declaration', options);\n\t  helper.ensureKeyExists('instruction', options);\n\t  helper.ensureKeyExists('attributes', options);\n\t  helper.ensureKeyExists('text', options);\n\t  helper.ensureKeyExists('comment', options);\n\t  helper.ensureKeyExists('cdata', options);\n\t  helper.ensureKeyExists('doctype', options);\n\t  helper.ensureKeyExists('type', options);\n\t  helper.ensureKeyExists('name', options);\n\t  helper.ensureKeyExists('elements', options);\n\t  helper.checkFnExists('doctype', options);\n\t  helper.checkFnExists('instruction', options);\n\t  helper.checkFnExists('cdata', options);\n\t  helper.checkFnExists('comment', options);\n\t  helper.checkFnExists('text', options);\n\t  helper.checkFnExists('instructionName', options);\n\t  helper.checkFnExists('elementName', options);\n\t  helper.checkFnExists('attributeName', options);\n\t  helper.checkFnExists('attributeValue', options);\n\t  helper.checkFnExists('attributes', options);\n\t  helper.checkFnExists('fullTagEmptyElement', options);\n\t  return options;\n\t}\n\n\tfunction writeIndentation(options, depth, firstLine) {\n\t  return (!firstLine && options.spaces ? '\\n' : '') + Array(depth + 1).join(options.spaces);\n\t}\n\n\tfunction writeAttributes(attributes, options, depth) {\n\t  if (options.ignoreAttributes) {\n\t    return '';\n\t  }\n\t  if ('attributesFn' in options) {\n\t    attributes = options.attributesFn(attributes, currentElementName, currentElement);\n\t  }\n\t  var key, attr, attrName, quote, result = [];\n\t  for (key in attributes) {\n\t    if (attributes.hasOwnProperty(key) && attributes[key] !== null && attributes[key] !== undefined) {\n\t      quote = options.noQuotesForNativeAttributes && typeof attributes[key] !== 'string' ? '' : '\"';\n\t      attr = '' + attributes[key]; // ensure number and boolean are converted to String\n\t      attr = attr.replace(/\"/g, '&quot;');\n\t      attrName = 'attributeNameFn' in options ? options.attributeNameFn(key, attr, currentElementName, currentElement) : key;\n\t      result.push((options.spaces && options.indentAttributes? writeIndentation(options, depth+1, false) : ' '));\n\t      result.push(attrName + '=' + quote + ('attributeValueFn' in options ? options.attributeValueFn(attr, key, currentElementName, currentElement) : attr) + quote);\n\t    }\n\t  }\n\t  if (attributes && Object.keys(attributes).length && options.spaces && options.indentAttributes) {\n\t    result.push(writeIndentation(options, depth, false));\n\t  }\n\t  return result.join('');\n\t}\n\n\tfunction writeDeclaration(declaration, options, depth) {\n\t  currentElement = declaration;\n\t  currentElementName = 'xml';\n\t  return options.ignoreDeclaration ? '' :  '<?' + 'xml' + writeAttributes(declaration[options.attributesKey], options, depth) + '?>';\n\t}\n\n\tfunction writeInstruction(instruction, options, depth) {\n\t  if (options.ignoreInstruction) {\n\t    return '';\n\t  }\n\t  var key;\n\t  for (key in instruction) {\n\t    if (instruction.hasOwnProperty(key)) {\n\t      break;\n\t    }\n\t  }\n\t  var instructionName = 'instructionNameFn' in options ? options.instructionNameFn(key, instruction[key], currentElementName, currentElement) : key;\n\t  if (typeof instruction[key] === 'object') {\n\t    currentElement = instruction;\n\t    currentElementName = instructionName;\n\t    return '<?' + instructionName + writeAttributes(instruction[key][options.attributesKey], options, depth) + '?>';\n\t  } else {\n\t    var instructionValue = instruction[key] ? instruction[key] : '';\n\t    if ('instructionFn' in options) instructionValue = options.instructionFn(instructionValue, key, currentElementName, currentElement);\n\t    return '<?' + instructionName + (instructionValue ? ' ' + instructionValue : '') + '?>';\n\t  }\n\t}\n\n\tfunction writeComment(comment, options) {\n\t  return options.ignoreComment ? '' : '<!--' + ('commentFn' in options ? options.commentFn(comment, currentElementName, currentElement) : comment) + '-->';\n\t}\n\n\tfunction writeCdata(cdata, options) {\n\t  return options.ignoreCdata ? '' : '<![CDATA[' + ('cdataFn' in options ? options.cdataFn(cdata, currentElementName, currentElement) : cdata.replace(']]>', ']]]]><![CDATA[>')) + ']]>';\n\t}\n\n\tfunction writeDoctype(doctype, options) {\n\t  return options.ignoreDoctype ? '' : '<!DOCTYPE ' + ('doctypeFn' in options ? options.doctypeFn(doctype, currentElementName, currentElement) : doctype) + '>';\n\t}\n\n\tfunction writeText(text, options) {\n\t  if (options.ignoreText) return '';\n\t  text = '' + text; // ensure Number and Boolean are converted to String\n\t  text = text.replace(/&amp;/g, '&'); // desanitize to avoid double sanitization\n\t  text = text.replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/>/g, '&gt;');\n\t  return 'textFn' in options ? options.textFn(text, currentElementName, currentElement) : text;\n\t}\n\n\tfunction hasContent(element, options) {\n\t  var i;\n\t  if (element.elements && element.elements.length) {\n\t    for (i = 0; i < element.elements.length; ++i) {\n\t      switch (element.elements[i][options.typeKey]) {\n\t      case 'text':\n\t        if (options.indentText) {\n\t          return true;\n\t        }\n\t        break; // skip to next key\n\t      case 'cdata':\n\t        if (options.indentCdata) {\n\t          return true;\n\t        }\n\t        break; // skip to next key\n\t      case 'instruction':\n\t        if (options.indentInstruction) {\n\t          return true;\n\t        }\n\t        break; // skip to next key\n\t      case 'doctype':\n\t      case 'comment':\n\t      case 'element':\n\t        return true;\n\t      default:\n\t        return true;\n\t      }\n\t    }\n\t  }\n\t  return false;\n\t}\n\n\tfunction writeElement(element, options, depth) {\n\t  currentElement = element;\n\t  currentElementName = element.name;\n\t  var xml = [], elementName = 'elementNameFn' in options ? options.elementNameFn(element.name, element) : element.name;\n\t  xml.push('<' + elementName);\n\t  if (element[options.attributesKey]) {\n\t    xml.push(writeAttributes(element[options.attributesKey], options, depth));\n\t  }\n\t  var withClosingTag = element[options.elementsKey] && element[options.elementsKey].length || element[options.attributesKey] && element[options.attributesKey]['xml:space'] === 'preserve';\n\t  if (!withClosingTag) {\n\t    if ('fullTagEmptyElementFn' in options) {\n\t      withClosingTag = options.fullTagEmptyElementFn(element.name, element);\n\t    } else {\n\t      withClosingTag = options.fullTagEmptyElement;\n\t    }\n\t  }\n\t  if (withClosingTag) {\n\t    xml.push('>');\n\t    if (element[options.elementsKey] && element[options.elementsKey].length) {\n\t      xml.push(writeElements(element[options.elementsKey], options, depth + 1));\n\t      currentElement = element;\n\t      currentElementName = element.name;\n\t    }\n\t    xml.push(options.spaces && hasContent(element, options) ? '\\n' + Array(depth + 1).join(options.spaces) : '');\n\t    xml.push('</' + elementName + '>');\n\t  } else {\n\t    xml.push('/>');\n\t  }\n\t  return xml.join('');\n\t}\n\n\tfunction writeElements(elements, options, depth, firstLine) {\n\t  return elements.reduce(function (xml, element) {\n\t    var indent = writeIndentation(options, depth, firstLine && !xml);\n\t    switch (element.type) {\n\t    case 'element': return xml + indent + writeElement(element, options, depth);\n\t    case 'comment': return xml + indent + writeComment(element[options.commentKey], options);\n\t    case 'doctype': return xml + indent + writeDoctype(element[options.doctypeKey], options);\n\t    case 'cdata': return xml + (options.indentCdata ? indent : '') + writeCdata(element[options.cdataKey], options);\n\t    case 'text': return xml + (options.indentText ? indent : '') + writeText(element[options.textKey], options);\n\t    case 'instruction':\n\t      var instruction = {};\n\t      instruction[element[options.nameKey]] = element[options.attributesKey] ? element : element[options.instructionKey];\n\t      return xml + (options.indentInstruction ? indent : '') + writeInstruction(instruction, options, depth);\n\t    }\n\t  }, '');\n\t}\n\n\tfunction hasContentCompact(element, options, anyContent) {\n\t  var key;\n\t  for (key in element) {\n\t    if (element.hasOwnProperty(key)) {\n\t      switch (key) {\n\t      case options.parentKey:\n\t      case options.attributesKey:\n\t        break; // skip to next key\n\t      case options.textKey:\n\t        if (options.indentText || anyContent) {\n\t          return true;\n\t        }\n\t        break; // skip to next key\n\t      case options.cdataKey:\n\t        if (options.indentCdata || anyContent) {\n\t          return true;\n\t        }\n\t        break; // skip to next key\n\t      case options.instructionKey:\n\t        if (options.indentInstruction || anyContent) {\n\t          return true;\n\t        }\n\t        break; // skip to next key\n\t      case options.doctypeKey:\n\t      case options.commentKey:\n\t        return true;\n\t      default:\n\t        return true;\n\t      }\n\t    }\n\t  }\n\t  return false;\n\t}\n\n\tfunction writeElementCompact(element, name, options, depth, indent) {\n\t  currentElement = element;\n\t  currentElementName = name;\n\t  var elementName = 'elementNameFn' in options ? options.elementNameFn(name, element) : name;\n\t  if (typeof element === 'undefined' || element === null || element === '') {\n\t    return 'fullTagEmptyElementFn' in options && options.fullTagEmptyElementFn(name, element) || options.fullTagEmptyElement ? '<' + elementName + '></' + elementName + '>' : '<' + elementName + '/>';\n\t  }\n\t  var xml = [];\n\t  if (name) {\n\t    xml.push('<' + elementName);\n\t    if (typeof element !== 'object') {\n\t      xml.push('>' + writeText(element,options) + '</' + elementName + '>');\n\t      return xml.join('');\n\t    }\n\t    if (element[options.attributesKey]) {\n\t      xml.push(writeAttributes(element[options.attributesKey], options, depth));\n\t    }\n\t    var withClosingTag = hasContentCompact(element, options, true) || element[options.attributesKey] && element[options.attributesKey]['xml:space'] === 'preserve';\n\t    if (!withClosingTag) {\n\t      if ('fullTagEmptyElementFn' in options) {\n\t        withClosingTag = options.fullTagEmptyElementFn(name, element);\n\t      } else {\n\t        withClosingTag = options.fullTagEmptyElement;\n\t      }\n\t    }\n\t    if (withClosingTag) {\n\t      xml.push('>');\n\t    } else {\n\t      xml.push('/>');\n\t      return xml.join('');\n\t    }\n\t  }\n\t  xml.push(writeElementsCompact(element, options, depth + 1, false));\n\t  currentElement = element;\n\t  currentElementName = name;\n\t  if (name) {\n\t    xml.push((indent ? writeIndentation(options, depth, false) : '') + '</' + elementName + '>');\n\t  }\n\t  return xml.join('');\n\t}\n\n\tfunction writeElementsCompact(element, options, depth, firstLine) {\n\t  var i, key, nodes, xml = [];\n\t  for (key in element) {\n\t    if (element.hasOwnProperty(key)) {\n\t      nodes = isArray(element[key]) ? element[key] : [element[key]];\n\t      for (i = 0; i < nodes.length; ++i) {\n\t        switch (key) {\n\t        case options.declarationKey: xml.push(writeDeclaration(nodes[i], options, depth)); break;\n\t        case options.instructionKey: xml.push((options.indentInstruction ? writeIndentation(options, depth, firstLine) : '') + writeInstruction(nodes[i], options, depth)); break;\n\t        case options.attributesKey: case options.parentKey: break; // skip\n\t        case options.textKey: xml.push((options.indentText ? writeIndentation(options, depth, firstLine) : '') + writeText(nodes[i], options)); break;\n\t        case options.cdataKey: xml.push((options.indentCdata ? writeIndentation(options, depth, firstLine) : '') + writeCdata(nodes[i], options)); break;\n\t        case options.doctypeKey: xml.push(writeIndentation(options, depth, firstLine) + writeDoctype(nodes[i], options)); break;\n\t        case options.commentKey: xml.push(writeIndentation(options, depth, firstLine) + writeComment(nodes[i], options)); break;\n\t        default: xml.push(writeIndentation(options, depth, firstLine) + writeElementCompact(nodes[i], key, options, depth, hasContentCompact(nodes[i], options)));\n\t        }\n\t        firstLine = firstLine && !xml.length;\n\t      }\n\t    }\n\t  }\n\t  return xml.join('');\n\t}\n\n\tjs2xml = function (js, options) {\n\t  options = validateOptions(options);\n\t  var xml = [];\n\t  currentElement = js;\n\t  currentElementName = '_root_';\n\t  if (options.compact) {\n\t    xml.push(writeElementsCompact(js, options, 0, true));\n\t  } else {\n\t    if (js[options.declarationKey]) {\n\t      xml.push(writeDeclaration(js[options.declarationKey], options, 0));\n\t    }\n\t    if (js[options.elementsKey] && js[options.elementsKey].length) {\n\t      xml.push(writeElements(js[options.elementsKey], options, 0, !xml.length));\n\t    }\n\t  }\n\t  return xml.join('');\n\t};\n\treturn js2xml;\n}\n\nvar json2xml;\nvar hasRequiredJson2xml;\n\nfunction requireJson2xml () {\n\tif (hasRequiredJson2xml) return json2xml;\n\thasRequiredJson2xml = 1;\n\tvar js2xml = requireJs2xml();\r\n\r\n\tjson2xml = function (json, options) {\r\n\t  if (json instanceof Buffer) {\r\n\t    json = json.toString();\r\n\t  }\r\n\t  var js = null;\r\n\t  if (typeof (json) === 'string') {\r\n\t    try {\r\n\t      js = JSON.parse(json);\r\n\t    } catch (e) {\r\n\t      throw new Error('The JSON structure is invalid');\r\n\t    }\r\n\t  } else {\r\n\t    js = json;\r\n\t  }\r\n\t  return js2xml(js, options);\r\n\t};\n\treturn json2xml;\n}\n\n/*jslint node:true */\n\nvar lib;\nvar hasRequiredLib;\n\nfunction requireLib () {\n\tif (hasRequiredLib) return lib;\n\thasRequiredLib = 1;\n\tvar xml2js = requireXml2js();\r\n\tvar xml2json = requireXml2json();\r\n\tvar js2xml = requireJs2xml();\r\n\tvar json2xml = requireJson2xml();\r\n\r\n\tlib = {\r\n\t  xml2js: xml2js,\r\n\t  xml2json: xml2json,\r\n\t  js2xml: js2xml,\r\n\t  json2xml: json2xml\r\n\t};\n\treturn lib;\n}\n\nvar libExports = requireLib();\n\nvar bufferExports = requireBuffer();\n\nclass TiledParser {\n  constructor(xml, filePath = \"\", basePath = \"\") {\n    this.xml = xml;\n    this.filePath = filePath;\n    this.basePath = basePath;\n    this.layers = /* @__PURE__ */ new Map();\n    this.transform = (obj) => {\n      if (!obj) return;\n      const attr = obj.attributes || obj._attributes;\n      if (!attr) return obj;\n      let newObj = {\n        ...obj,\n        ...attr,\n        ...TiledParser.propToNumber(attr, [\n          \"version\",\n          \"width\",\n          \"height\",\n          \"tilewidth\",\n          \"tileheight\",\n          \"nextlayerid\",\n          \"nextobjectid\",\n          \"hexsidelength\",\n          \"opacity\",\n          \"x\",\n          \"y\",\n          \"offsetx\",\n          \"offsety\",\n          \"startx\",\n          \"starty\",\n          \"id\",\n          \"firstgid\",\n          \"imageheight\",\n          \"imagewidth\",\n          \"margin\",\n          \"columns\",\n          \"rows\",\n          \"tilecount\",\n          \"rotation\",\n          \"gid\",\n          \"tileid\",\n          \"duration\",\n          \"parallaxx\",\n          \"parallaxy\",\n          \"repeatx\",\n          \"repeaty\",\n          \"pixelsize\"\n        ]),\n        ...TiledParser.propToBool(attr, [\n          \"visible\",\n          \"infinite\",\n          \"locked\",\n          \"bold\",\n          \"italic\",\n          \"kerning\",\n          \"strikeout\",\n          \"underline\",\n          \"wrap\"\n        ])\n      };\n      if (newObj.properties) {\n        const properties = TiledParser.toArray(newObj.properties.property);\n        const propObj = {};\n        for (let prop of properties) {\n          const attr2 = prop._attributes;\n          if (!attr2) continue;\n          let val;\n          switch (attr2.type) {\n            case \"file\":\n              val = this.getImagePath(attr2.value);\n              break;\n            case \"object\":\n            case \"float\":\n            case \"int\":\n              val = +attr2.value;\n              break;\n            case \"bool\":\n              val = attr2.value == \"true\" ? true : false;\n              break;\n            case \"class\":\n              val = {\n                ...this.transform(prop)?.properties ?? {},\n                _classname: attr2.propertytype\n              };\n              break;\n            default:\n              val = attr2.value;\n          }\n          propObj[attr2.name] = val;\n        }\n        newObj.properties = propObj;\n      }\n      if (newObj.polygon) {\n        newObj.polygon = this.transform(newObj.polygon);\n      }\n      if (newObj.polyline) {\n        newObj.polyline = this.transform(newObj.polyline);\n      }\n      if (newObj.points) {\n        newObj = newObj.points.split(\" \").map((point) => {\n          const pos = point.split(\",\");\n          return { x: +pos[0], y: +pos[1] };\n        });\n      }\n      if (newObj.point) {\n        newObj.point = true;\n      }\n      if (newObj.ellipse) {\n        newObj.ellipse = true;\n      }\n      if (newObj.text) {\n        newObj.text = {\n          text: newObj.text._text,\n          ...this.transform(newObj.text)\n        };\n        delete newObj.text._text;\n      }\n      if (newObj.image) {\n        newObj.image = this.transform(newObj.image);\n      }\n      if (newObj.source) {\n        if (!this.isTilesetSource(newObj)) {\n          newObj.source = this.getImagePath(newObj.source);\n        }\n      }\n      const objectgroup = newObj.object || newObj.objectgroup?.object;\n      if (objectgroup) {\n        newObj.objects = TiledParser.toArray(objectgroup).map((object) => {\n          return this.transform(object);\n        });\n      }\n      delete newObj._attributes;\n      delete newObj.attributes;\n      delete newObj.object;\n      delete newObj.objectgroup;\n      return newObj;\n    };\n  }\n  static {\n    this.propToNumber = (obj, props) => {\n      for (let key of props) {\n        if (obj[key] !== void 0) {\n          obj[key] = +obj[key];\n        }\n      }\n      return obj;\n    };\n  }\n  static {\n    this.propToBool = (obj, props) => {\n      for (let key of props) {\n        if (obj[key] !== void 0) {\n          obj[key] = obj[key] == \"true\" || obj[key] == \"1\";\n        }\n      }\n      return obj;\n    };\n  }\n  static toArray(prop) {\n    if (!prop) return [];\n    if (!Array.isArray(prop)) return [prop];\n    return prop;\n  }\n  getImagePath(image) {\n    if (this.filePath.startsWith(\"http\")) return new URL(image, this.filePath).href;\n    return joinPath(this.basePath, image);\n  }\n  /**\n   * Check if the object is a tileset source reference\n   * Tileset sources should not have their paths transformed with getImagePath\n   */\n  isTilesetSource(obj) {\n    return obj.firstgid !== void 0 || obj.tilewidth !== void 0 || obj.tileheight !== void 0 || obj.tilecount !== void 0 || obj.columns !== void 0;\n  }\n  static unpackTileBytes(buffer, size) {\n    const expectedCount = size * 4;\n    if (buffer.length !== expectedCount) {\n      throw new Error(\"Expected \" + expectedCount + \" bytes of tile data; received \" + buffer.length);\n    }\n    let tileIndex = 0;\n    const array = [];\n    for (let i = 0; i < expectedCount; i += 4) {\n      array[tileIndex] = buffer.readUInt32LE(i);\n      tileIndex++;\n    }\n    return array;\n  }\n  static decode(obj, size) {\n    const { encoding, data } = obj;\n    if (encoding == \"base64\") {\n      return TiledParser.unpackTileBytes(bufferExports.Buffer.from(data.trim(), \"base64\"), size);\n    } else if (encoding == \"csv\") {\n      return data.trim().split(\",\").map((x) => +x);\n    }\n    return data;\n  }\n  parseMap() {\n    const json = libExports.xml2js(this.xml, { compact: true });\n    const jsonNoCompact = libExports.xml2js(this.xml);\n    const tileset = json.map.tileset;\n    json.map.group;\n    const recursiveObjectGroup = (obj) => {\n      const { objectgroup, group: group2, layer, imagelayer } = obj;\n      const setLayer = (type) => {\n        if (!type) return;\n        TiledParser.toArray(type).forEach((val) => {\n          if (this.layers.has(+val._attributes.id)) {\n            throw new Error(`Tiled Parser Error: Layer with id ${val._attributes.id} already exists`);\n          }\n          this.layers.set(+val._attributes.id, val);\n        });\n      };\n      setLayer(objectgroup);\n      setLayer(layer);\n      setLayer(group2);\n      setLayer(imagelayer);\n      if (group2) {\n        recursiveObjectGroup(group2);\n      }\n    };\n    recursiveObjectGroup(json.map);\n    const recursiveLayer = (elements, array = []) => {\n      if (!elements) return array;\n      for (let element of elements) {\n        const { name } = element;\n        if (![\"layer\", \"group\", \"imagelayer\", \"objectgroup\"].includes(name)) continue;\n        const data = element.elements?.find((el) => el.name == \"data\");\n        element.layer = this.layers.get(+element.attributes.id);\n        const obj = {\n          ...this.transform(data) ?? {},\n          ...this.transform(element),\n          ...this.transform(element.layer),\n          layers: recursiveLayer(element.elements),\n          data: data ? data.elements[0].text : void 0,\n          type: name == \"layer\" ? \"tilelayer\" : name\n        };\n        delete obj.elements;\n        delete obj.layer;\n        if (obj.data) obj.data = TiledParser.decode(obj, obj.width * obj.height);\n        array.push(obj);\n      }\n      return array;\n    };\n    const layers = recursiveLayer(jsonNoCompact.elements[0].elements);\n    const tilesets = TiledParser.toArray(tileset).map((tileset2) => {\n      const obj = this.transform(tileset2);\n      return obj;\n    });\n    const ret = {\n      ...this.transform(json.map),\n      layers,\n      tilesets\n    };\n    delete ret.layer;\n    delete ret.tileset;\n    delete ret.group;\n    delete ret.imagelayer;\n    return ret;\n  }\n  parseTileset() {\n    const json = libExports.xml2js(this.xml, { compact: true });\n    const { tileset } = json;\n    const ret = {\n      ...this.transform(tileset),\n      image: this.transform(tileset.image),\n      tiles: TiledParser.toArray(tileset.tile).map((tile) => {\n        const ret2 = this.transform(tile);\n        if (tile.animation) {\n          ret2.animations = TiledParser.toArray(tile.animation.frame).map(this.transform);\n        }\n        delete ret2.animation;\n        return ret2;\n      })\n    };\n    delete ret.tile;\n    return ret;\n  }\n}\n\nclass TiledProperties {\n  constructor(data) {\n    this.properties = {};\n    this.properties = data?.properties ?? {};\n  }\n  getProperty(name, defaultValue) {\n    const val = this.properties[name];\n    if (val === void 0) {\n      return defaultValue;\n    }\n    return val;\n  }\n  hasProperty(name) {\n    return !!this.properties[name];\n  }\n  setProperty(name, value) {\n    this.properties[name] = value;\n  }\n  getType() {\n    return this.class || this[\"type\"];\n  }\n}\n\nconst FLIPPED_HORIZONTALLY_FLAG = 2147483648;\nconst FLIPPED_VERTICALLY_FLAG = 1073741824;\nconst FLIPPED_DIAGONALLY_FLAG = 536870912;\nconst ROTATED_HEXAGONAL_120_FLAG = 268435456;\nclass TileGid extends TiledProperties {\n  constructor(obj) {\n    super(obj);\n    this.obj = obj;\n    this._gid = obj?.gid;\n  }\n  static getRealGid(gid) {\n    return gid & 268435455;\n  }\n  get horizontalFlip() {\n    return !!(this._gid & FLIPPED_HORIZONTALLY_FLAG);\n  }\n  get verticalFlip() {\n    return !!(this._gid & FLIPPED_VERTICALLY_FLAG);\n  }\n  get diagonalFlip() {\n    return !!(this._gid & FLIPPED_DIAGONALLY_FLAG);\n  }\n  get rotatedHex120() {\n    return !!(this._gid & ROTATED_HEXAGONAL_120_FLAG);\n  }\n  get gid() {\n    return TileGid.getRealGid(this._gid);\n  }\n  set gid(val) {\n    this._gid = val;\n  }\n}\n\nclass Tile extends TileGid {\n  constructor(tile) {\n    super(tile);\n    this.tile = tile;\n    const preservedProperties = this.properties;\n    Reflect.deleteProperty(tile, \"gid\");\n    Object.assign(this, tile);\n    if (preservedProperties && Object.keys(preservedProperties).length > 0) {\n      this.properties = { ...preservedProperties, ...this.properties };\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nclass TiledObjectClass extends TileGid {\n  constructor(object) {\n    super(object);\n    this.layerName = \"\";\n    Object.assign(this, object);\n    if (object?.gid) {\n      this.y -= this.height;\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nclass Layer extends TiledProperties {\n  constructor(layer, tilesets, parent) {\n    super(layer);\n    this.tilesets = tilesets;\n    this.parent = parent;\n    this.cacheTiles = false;\n    this.tiles = [];\n    Object.assign(this, layer);\n    this.mapObjects();\n    this.mergePropertiesWithParent();\n    this.cacheTiles = this.getProperty(\"cache-tiles\", false);\n    if (this.cacheTiles) this.propertiesTiles();\n  }\n  get size() {\n    return this.data.length;\n  }\n  createTile(gid, tileIndex, layerIndex) {\n    if (gid == 0) {\n      return;\n    }\n    const realGid = TileGid.getRealGid(gid);\n    const tileset = Layer.findTileSet(realGid, this.tilesets);\n    if (!tileset) {\n      return void 0;\n    }\n    const tile = tileset.getTile(realGid - tileset.firstgid);\n    if (tile) {\n      return new Tile({\n        ...tile.tile,\n        gid,\n        index: tileIndex,\n        layerIndex\n      });\n    }\n    return new Tile({\n      gid,\n      index: tileIndex,\n      layerIndex\n    });\n  }\n  mergePropertiesWithParent() {\n    const parent = this.getLayerParent();\n    if (!this.properties) this.properties = {};\n    if (!parent) return;\n    for (let key in parent.properties) {\n      const val = parent.properties[key];\n      const valChild = this.properties[key];\n      if (valChild === void 0) {\n        this.properties[key] = val;\n      } else {\n        if (key == \"z\") {\n          this.properties[key] += val;\n        } else {\n          continue;\n        }\n      }\n    }\n    this.opacity = Math.round((parent.opacity ?? 1) * (this.opacity ?? 1) * 100) / 100;\n    this.offsetx = (parent.offsetx ?? 0) + (this.offsetx ?? 0);\n    this.offsety = (parent.offsety ?? 0) + (this.offsety ?? 0);\n    this.locked = parent.locked ?? false;\n  }\n  propertiesTiles() {\n    if (!this.data) return;\n    const data = this.data;\n    for (let i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {\n      const id = data[i];\n      this.tiles.push(this.createTile(id, i));\n    }\n  }\n  mapObjects() {\n    if (this.objects) {\n      this.objects = this.objects.map((object) => {\n        const obj = new TiledObjectClass(object);\n        obj.layerName = this.name;\n        return obj;\n      });\n    }\n  }\n  getTileByIndex(tileIndex) {\n    if (this.cacheTiles) {\n      return this.tiles[tileIndex];\n    }\n    return this.createTile(this.data[tileIndex], tileIndex);\n  }\n  static findTileSet(gid, tileSets) {\n    let tileset;\n    for (let i = tileSets.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\n      tileset = tileSets[i];\n      if (tileset.firstgid && tileset.firstgid <= gid) {\n        break;\n      }\n    }\n    return tileset;\n  }\n  getLayerParent() {\n    return this.parent;\n  }\n  tilesForEach(cb) {\n    for (let i = 0; i < this.data.length; i++) {\n      if (this.cacheTiles) {\n        cb(this.tiles[i], i);\n        continue;\n      }\n      cb(this.createTile(this.data[i], i), i);\n    }\n  }\n  setData(tileIndex, gid) {\n    this.data[tileIndex] = gid;\n  }\n}\n\nclass Tileset extends TiledProperties {\n  constructor(tileset) {\n    super(tileset);\n    this.tileset = tileset;\n    this.cacheTileId = /* @__PURE__ */ new Map();\n    Object.assign(this, tileset);\n    this.margin = this.margin ?? 0;\n    this.spacing = this.spacing ?? 0;\n    const tilesArray = tileset.tiles || tileset.tile || [];\n    for (let tile of tilesArray) {\n      this.addTile(tile);\n    }\n    Reflect.deleteProperty(this, \"tiles\");\n    Reflect.deleteProperty(this, \"tile\");\n  }\n  addTile(tileObj) {\n    const tile = new Tile(tileObj);\n    this.cacheTileId.set(tile.id, tile);\n    return tile;\n  }\n  getTile(id) {\n    return this.cacheTileId.get(+id);\n  }\n}\n\nclass TiledParserFile {\n  constructor(file, {\n    basePath = \"\",\n    staticDir = \"\",\n    relativePath = \"\"\n  } = {}) {\n    this.file = file;\n    this.basePath = basePath;\n  }\n  static isBrowser() {\n    return typeof window !== \"undefined\" && !window.useFileSystem;\n  }\n  static typeOfFile(file) {\n    file = file.trim();\n    const isString = typeof file == \"string\";\n    const info = {\n      isXml: isString && file.startsWith(\"<?xml\"),\n      isObject: !!file[\"version\"],\n      isHttp: isString && file.startsWith(\"http\")\n    };\n    return {\n      ...info,\n      isPath: !info.isXml && !info.isObject && !info.isHttp\n    };\n  }\n  _parseFile(file, type, cb) {\n    const isXml = (content) => TiledParserFile.typeOfFile(content).isXml;\n    const loadContent = (content) => {\n      if (!content) {\n        return cb(null);\n      }\n      if (isXml(content)) {\n        const parser = new TiledParser(content, file, this.basePath);\n        if (type == \"map\") {\n          const json = parser.parseMap();\n          return cb(json);\n        } else if (type == \"tileset\") {\n          const json = parser.parseTileset();\n          return cb(json);\n        }\n      }\n      return cb(JSON.parse(content));\n    };\n    if (TiledParserFile.typeOfFile(file).isObject) {\n      return cb(file);\n    }\n    const { isHttp } = TiledParserFile.typeOfFile(file);\n    if (isXml(file)) {\n      loadContent(file);\n    } else if (isHttp || TiledParserFile.isBrowser() && process.env.NODE_ENV != \"test\") {\n      let url = isHttp ? file : joinPath(this.basePath, file);\n      if (TiledParserFile.isBrowser() && window.urlCache) {\n        url = window.urlCache[file];\n      }\n      fetch(url, {\n        headers: {\n          \"Content-Type\": \"application/xml\"\n        }\n      }).then((response) => response.text()).then(loadContent).catch((err) => cb(null, err));\n    }\n  }\n  parseFile(cb, options = {}) {\n    const { getOnlyBasename } = options;\n    const basename = (path) => path.substring(path.lastIndexOf(\"/\") + 1);\n    if (getOnlyBasename) {\n      if (TiledParserFile.typeOfFile(this.file).isPath) {\n        this.file = basename(this.file);\n      }\n    }\n    this._parseFile(this.file, \"map\", (map, err) => {\n      let hasError = false;\n      if (err) return cb(null, err);\n      if (map.tilesets) {\n        const parseTileset = [];\n        const finish = () => {\n          loadAll++;\n          if (loadAll == map.tilesets.length && !hasError) {\n            map.tilesets = parseTileset;\n            cb(map);\n          }\n        };\n        let loadAll = 0;\n        for (let i = 0; i < map.tilesets.length; i++) {\n          const tileset = map.tilesets[i];\n          if (!tileset.source || tileset.tiles || tileset.image || tileset.tile) {\n            parseTileset[i] = tileset;\n            finish();\n            continue;\n          }\n          if (getOnlyBasename) {\n            if (TiledParserFile.typeOfFile(tileset.source).isPath) {\n              tileset.source = basename(tileset.source);\n            }\n          }\n          this._parseFile(tileset.source, \"tileset\", (result, err2) => {\n            if (err2) {\n              hasError = true;\n              return cb(null, err2);\n            }\n            parseTileset[i] = {\n              ...result,\n              firstgid: tileset.firstgid\n            };\n            finish();\n          });\n        }\n      }\n    });\n  }\n  parseFilePromise(options = {}) {\n    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {\n      this.parseFile((ret, err) => {\n        if (ret) resolve(ret);\n        else reject(err);\n      }, options);\n    });\n  }\n}\n\nlet bufferTilesets = {};\nclass MapClass extends TiledProperties {\n  constructor(map) {\n    super(map ?? {});\n    this.tilesets = [];\n    this.layers = [];\n    this.tmpLayers = [];\n    this.tilesIndex = {};\n    /**\n     * Allows to define the size of ArrayBuffer to keep in memory the tiles of the map\n     */\n    this.allocateMemory = 0;\n    /**\n     * If set to true, the memory allocation will take only one tile (the tile of the last layer)\n     */\n    this.lowMemory = false;\n    if (map) this.load(map);\n  }\n  load(map) {\n    Object.assign(this, map);\n    if (this.hasProperty(\"low-memory\")) {\n      this.lowMemory = this.getProperty(\"low-memory\", false);\n    }\n    this.tmpLayers = [];\n    this.mapTilesets();\n    this.mapLayers(this.layers);\n    this.layers = [...this.tmpLayers];\n    Reflect.deleteProperty(this, \"tmpLayers\");\n    this.setTilesIndex();\n    this.data = map;\n  }\n  /** \n   * @title Width of the map in pixels\n   * @prop {number} [widthPx]\n   * @readonly\n   * @memberof Map\n   * @memberof RpgSceneMap\n   * */\n  get widthPx() {\n    return this.width * this.tilewidth;\n  }\n  /** \n  * @title Height of the map in pixels\n  * @prop {number} [heightPx]\n  * @readonly\n  * @memberof Map\n  * @memberof RpgSceneMap\n  * */\n  get heightPx() {\n    return this.height * this.tileheight;\n  }\n  /** \n   * @title The depth of the map in pixels (this is the height of a tile ;))\n   * @prop {number} map.zTileHeight\n   * @readonly\n   * @memberof Map\n   * @memberof RpgSceneMap\n   * */\n  get zTileHeight() {\n    return this.tileheight;\n  }\n  /**\n       * Find a layer by name. Returns `undefined` is the layer is not found\n  \n       * @title Get Layer by name\n       * @method map.getLayerByName(name)\n       * @param {string} name layer name\n       * @returns {LayerInfo | undefined}\n       * @example\n       *  ```ts\n       *  const tiles = map.getLayerByName(0, 0)\n       *  ```\n       * @memberof Map\n       * @memberof RpgSceneMap\n       */\n  getLayerByName(name) {\n    return this.layers.find((layer) => layer.name == name);\n  }\n  /**\n  * Get the tile index on the tileset\n  * \n  * @title Get index of tile\n  * @method map.getTileIndex(x,y)\n  * @param {number} x Position X\n  * @param {number} x Position Y\n  * @returns {number}\n  * @memberof Map\n  * @memberof RpgSceneMap\n  */\n  getTileIndex(x, y, [z] = [0]) {\n    return this.width * Math.floor((y - z) / this.tileheight) + Math.floor(x / this.tilewidth);\n  }\n  getTilePosition(index) {\n    return {\n      y: Math.floor(index / this.width) * this.tileheight,\n      x: index % this.width * this.tilewidth\n    };\n  }\n  /**\n       * Find the point of origin (top left) of a tile. Of course, its position depends on the size of the tile\n  \n       * @title Get origin position of tile\n       * @method map.getTileOriginPosition(x,y)\n       * @param {number} x Position X\n       * @param {number} x Position Y\n       * @returns { {x: number, y: number }}\n       * @example\n       *  ```ts\n       *  // If the size of a tile is 32x32px\n       *  const position = map.getTileOriginPosition(35, 12)\n       *  console.log(position) // { x: 32, y: 0 }\n       *  ```\n       * @memberof Map\n       * @memberof RpgSceneMap\n       */\n  getTileOriginPosition(x, y) {\n    return {\n      x: Math.floor(x / this.tilewidth) * this.tilewidth,\n      y: Math.floor(y / this.tileheight) * this.tileheight\n    };\n  }\n  /**\n      * Recover tiles according to a position\n  \n      * @title Get tile by position\n      * @method map.getTileByPosition(x,y)\n      * @param {number} x Position X\n      * @param {number} x Position Y\n      * @returns {TileInfo}\n      * @example\n      *  ```ts\n      *  const tiles = map.getTileByPosition(0, 0)\n      *  ```\n      * @memberof Map\n      * @memberof RpgSceneMap\n      */\n  getTileByPosition(x, y, z = [0, 0], options = {}) {\n    const tileIndex = this.getTileIndex(x, y, [z[0]]);\n    return this.getTileByIndex(tileIndex, z, options);\n  }\n  /**\n       * Retrieves tiles according to its index\n  \n       * @title Get tile by index\n       * @method map.getTileByIndex(tileIndex)\n       * @param {number} tileIndex tile index\n       * @returns {TileInfo}\n       * @example\n       *  ```ts\n       *  const index = map.getTileIndex(0, 0)\n       *  const tiles = map.getTileByIndex(index)\n       *  ```\n       * @memberof Map\n       * @memberof RpgSceneMap\n       */\n  getTileByIndex(tileIndex, zPlayer = [0, 0], options = {\n    populateTiles: true\n  }) {\n    const zA = Math.floor(zPlayer[0] / this.zTileHeight);\n    Math.floor(zPlayer[1] / this.zTileHeight);\n    const level = this.tilesIndex[zA];\n    const obj = {\n      tiles: [],\n      hasCollision: false,\n      isOverlay: false,\n      objectGroups: [],\n      tileIndex\n    };\n    if (!level) {\n      return obj;\n    }\n    const [layer] = this.layers;\n    const getTileByPointer = (pointer = 0) => {\n      const pos = tileIndex * this.realAllocateMemory + pointer;\n      const gid = level[pos];\n      if (gid === 0) {\n        return obj;\n      }\n      const tile2 = layer.createTile(gid, tileIndex, level[pos + 1]);\n      if (tile2) obj.tiles.push(tile2);\n    };\n    if (options.populateTiles) {\n      for (let i = 0; i < this.realAllocateMemory; i += 2) {\n        getTileByPointer(i);\n      }\n    } else {\n      getTileByPointer();\n    }\n    const [tile] = obj.tiles;\n    if (tile) {\n      obj.hasCollision = tile.getProperty(\"collision\", false);\n      obj.objectGroups = tile.objects ?? [];\n    }\n    return obj;\n  }\n  getAllObjects() {\n    return this.layers.reduce((prev, current) => {\n      if (!current.objects) return prev;\n      return prev.concat(...current.objects);\n    }, []);\n  }\n  getData() {\n    return {\n      ...this.data,\n      layers: this.layers\n    };\n  }\n  setTile(x, y, layerFilter, tileInfo) {\n    if (this.lowMemory) {\n      throw \"Impossible to change a tile with the lowMemory option\";\n    }\n    const tileIndex = this.getTileIndex(x, y);\n    let fnFilter;\n    let tilesEdited = {};\n    if (typeof layerFilter == \"string\") {\n      fnFilter = (layer) => layer.name == layerFilter;\n    } else {\n      fnFilter = layerFilter;\n    }\n    for (let i = 0; i < this.layers.length; i++) {\n      const layer = this.layers[i];\n      if (!fnFilter(layer)) continue;\n      let tile;\n      const oldTile = this.getTileByIndex(tileIndex);\n      if (tileInfo.gid) {\n        tile = layer.createTile(tileInfo.gid, tileIndex);\n      }\n      if (!tile) continue;\n      for (let key in tileInfo) {\n        if (key == \"gid\") continue;\n        tile[key] = tileInfo[key];\n      }\n      tilesEdited[layer.name] = {\n        gid: tile.gid,\n        properties: tile.properties\n      };\n      this.setTileIndex(layer, oldTile.tiles[0], tile, tileIndex, i);\n      layer.setData(tileIndex, tile.gid);\n    }\n    return {\n      x,\n      y,\n      tiles: tilesEdited\n    };\n  }\n  removeCacheTileset(name) {\n    delete bufferTilesets[name];\n  }\n  clearCacheTilesets() {\n    bufferTilesets = {};\n  }\n  mapTilesets() {\n    this.tilesets = this.tilesets.map((tileset) => {\n      if (bufferTilesets[tileset.name]) {\n        const instance = bufferTilesets[tileset.name];\n        instance.firstgid = tileset.firstgid;\n        return instance;\n      }\n      const _tileset = new Tileset(tileset);\n      bufferTilesets[_tileset.name] = _tileset;\n      return _tileset;\n    });\n  }\n  mapLayers(layers = [], parent) {\n    for (let layer of layers) {\n      const layerInstance = new Layer(layer, this.tilesets, parent);\n      this.tmpLayers.push(layerInstance);\n      if (layer.layers) {\n        this.mapLayers(layer.layers, layerInstance);\n      }\n    }\n    if (this.lowMemory) this.allocateMemory = 1;\n    if (!this.allocateMemory) this.allocateMemory = this.layers.length;\n  }\n  setTileIndex(layer, oldTile, newTile, tileIndex, layerIndex) {\n    const startPos = tileIndex * this.realAllocateMemory;\n    let pointer = startPos + this.realAllocateMemory - 2;\n    const zLayer = layer.getProperty(\"z\", 0);\n    const zTile = oldTile.getProperty(\"z\", 0);\n    let z = zLayer + zTile;\n    while (pointer >= startPos) {\n      const zlayer = this.tilesIndex[z];\n      if (zlayer[pointer] === oldTile.gid && zlayer[pointer + 1] === layerIndex) {\n        this.tilesIndex[z][pointer] = newTile.gid;\n      }\n      pointer -= 2;\n    }\n  }\n  /**\n   * We multiply by 2 because 2 entries are stored for a tile: its GID and the Layer Index\n   * \n   * Example If I have 3 layers, The array will have the following form \n   * \n   * [\n   *  GID of Layer 3, \n   *  Layer Index of Layer 3, \n   *  GID of Layer 2, \n   *  Layer Index of Layer 2, \n   *  GID of Layer 1, \n   *  Layer Index of Layer 1,\n   * ... others tiles\n   * ]\n   * \n   * The size in memory of the map is therefore:\n   * \n   * `(map width * map height * number of layers * 4) bytes`\n   * \n   * > We multiply by 4, because an element takes 2 bytes and has 2 elements for a tile is 4 bytes in all\n   * \n   * Example (a 100x100 map with 5 layers)\n   * \n   * `100 * 100 * 5 * 4 = 200000 bytes = ~195 Kb`\n   * \n   * If we define on lowMemory then the calculation is the following\n   * \n   * `(map width * map height * 4) bytes`\n   * \n   * Example\n   * \n   * `100 * 100 * 4 = 40000 bytes = ~39 Kb`\n   */\n  get realAllocateMemory() {\n    return this.allocateMemory * 2;\n  }\n  /**\n   * We keep each tile in memory classified by z value. The values are ordered from the end to the beginning so that the first element of the array (when retrieved with getTileByIndex() is the tile on the highest layer. This way, the tile search is very fast for collisions \n   * \n   */\n  addTileIndex(layer, tile, tileIndex, layerIndex) {\n    if (!tile || tile && tile.gid == 0) {\n      return;\n    }\n    const zLayer = layer.getProperty(\"z\", 0);\n    const zTile = tile.getProperty(\"z\", 0);\n    let z = zLayer + zTile;\n    if (!this.tilesIndex[z]) {\n      const buffer = new ArrayBuffer(layer.size * this.realAllocateMemory * 2);\n      this.tilesIndex[z] = new Uint16Array(buffer);\n    }\n    const startPos = tileIndex * this.realAllocateMemory;\n    let pointer = startPos + this.realAllocateMemory - 2;\n    while (this.tilesIndex[z][pointer] !== 0 && pointer > startPos) {\n      pointer -= 2;\n    }\n    this.tilesIndex[z][pointer] = tile.gid;\n    this.tilesIndex[z][pointer + 1] = layerIndex;\n    this.tilesIndex[z][startPos] = tile.gid;\n    this.tilesIndex[z][startPos + 1] = layerIndex;\n  }\n  setTilesIndex() {\n    for (let i = 0; i < this.layers.length; i++) {\n      const layer = this.layers[i];\n      if (layer.type != TiledLayerType.Tile) {\n        continue;\n      }\n      layer.tilesForEach((tile, index) => {\n        this.addTileIndex(layer, tile, index, i);\n      });\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nexport { Layer, MapClass, Tile, TiledLayerType, TiledObjectClass, TiledParser, TiledParserFile, TiledProperties, Tileset, isTiledFormat };\n//# sourceMappingURL=index.js.map\n","const settings = {\n  /** The default number of textures per tilemap in a tilemap composite. */\n  TEXTURES_PER_TILEMAP: 16,\n  /** The scaling mode of the combined texture tiling. */\n  TEXTILE_SCALE_MODE: \"linear\",\n  /** This will enable 32-bit index buffers. It's useful when you have more than 16K tiles. */\n  use32bitIndex: false\n};\nconst Constant = settings;\n\nexport { Constant, settings };\n//# sourceMappingURL=settings.mjs.map\n","import { Geometry, Buffer, BufferUsage } from 'pixi.js';\n\nvar __defProp = Object.defineProperty;\nvar __defNormalProp = (obj, key, value) => key in obj ? __defProp(obj, key, { enumerable: true, configurable: true, writable: true, value }) : obj[key] = value;\nvar __publicField = (obj, key, value) => {\n  __defNormalProp(obj, typeof key !== \"symbol\" ? key + \"\" : key, value);\n  return value;\n};\nconst _TilemapGeometry = class _TilemapGeometry extends Geometry {\n  constructor(indexBuffer) {\n    const buf = new Buffer({\n      data: new Float32Array(2),\n      label: \"tilemap-buffer\",\n      usage: BufferUsage.VERTEX | BufferUsage.COPY_DST,\n      shrinkToFit: false\n    });\n    const stride = _TilemapGeometry.stride;\n    super({\n      indexBuffer,\n      attributes: {\n        aVertexPosition: {\n          buffer: buf,\n          format: \"float32x2\",\n          stride,\n          offset: 0\n          // location: 6,\n        },\n        aTextureCoord: {\n          buffer: buf,\n          format: \"float32x2\",\n          stride,\n          offset: 2 * 4\n          // location: 4,\n        },\n        aFrame: {\n          buffer: buf,\n          format: \"float32x4\",\n          stride,\n          offset: 4 * 4\n          // location: 3,\n        },\n        aAnim: {\n          buffer: buf,\n          format: \"float32x2\",\n          stride,\n          offset: 8 * 4\n          // location: 1,\n        },\n        aTextureId: {\n          buffer: buf,\n          format: \"sint32\",\n          stride,\n          offset: 10 * 4\n          // location: 5\n        },\n        aAnimDivisor: {\n          buffer: buf,\n          format: \"float32\",\n          stride,\n          offset: 11 * 4\n          // location: 2\n        },\n        aAlpha: {\n          buffer: buf,\n          format: \"float32\",\n          stride,\n          offset: 12 * 4\n          // location: 0\n        }\n      }\n    });\n    __publicField(this, \"lastTimeAccess\", 0);\n    __publicField(this, \"vertSize\", _TilemapGeometry.vertSize);\n    __publicField(this, \"vertPerQuad\", _TilemapGeometry.vertPerQuad);\n    __publicField(this, \"stride\", _TilemapGeometry.stride);\n    __publicField(this, \"buf\");\n    this.buf = buf;\n  }\n};\n__publicField(_TilemapGeometry, \"vertSize\", 13);\n__publicField(_TilemapGeometry, \"vertPerQuad\", 4);\n__publicField(_TilemapGeometry, \"stride\", _TilemapGeometry.vertSize * 4);\nlet TilemapGeometry = _TilemapGeometry;\n\nexport { TilemapGeometry };\n//# sourceMappingURL=TilemapGeometry.mjs.map\n","import { ExtensionType, UniformGroup, Matrix, Buffer, BufferUsage, NOOP } from 'pixi.js';\nimport { settings } from './settings.mjs';\nimport { TilemapGeometry } from './TilemapGeometry.mjs';\n\nvar __defProp = Object.defineProperty;\nvar __defNormalProp = (obj, key, value) => key in obj ? __defProp(obj, key, { enumerable: true, configurable: true, writable: true, value }) : obj[key] = value;\nvar __publicField = (obj, key, value) => {\n  __defNormalProp(obj, typeof key !== \"symbol\" ? key + \"\" : key, value);\n  return value;\n};\nclass TilemapAdaptor {\n  constructor() {\n    __publicField(this, \"pipe_uniforms\", new UniformGroup({\n      u_proj_trans: { value: new Matrix(), type: \"mat3x3<f32>\" },\n      u_anim_frame: { value: new Float32Array(2), type: \"vec2<f32>\" }\n    }));\n  }\n}\nclass TilemapPipe {\n  constructor(renderer, adaptor) {\n    /** The managing renderer */\n    __publicField(this, \"renderer\");\n    /** The tile animation frame */\n    __publicField(this, \"tileAnim\", [0, 0]);\n    __publicField(this, \"ibLen\", 0);\n    // index buffer length\n    /** The index buffer for the tilemaps to share. */\n    __publicField(this, \"indexBuffer\", null);\n    /** The shader used to render tilemaps. */\n    __publicField(this, \"shader\");\n    __publicField(this, \"adaptor\");\n    this.renderer = renderer;\n    this.adaptor = adaptor;\n    this.adaptor.init();\n    this.indexBuffer = new Buffer({\n      data: new Uint16Array([0, 1, 2, 0, 2, 3]),\n      label: \"index-tilemap-buffer\",\n      usage: BufferUsage.INDEX | BufferUsage.COPY_DST\n    });\n    this.indexBuffer.destroy = NOOP;\n    this.checkIndexBuffer(2e3);\n  }\n  start() {\n  }\n  /**\n  * @internal\n  * @ignore\n  */\n  createVb() {\n    const geom = new TilemapGeometry(this.indexBuffer);\n    geom.lastTimeAccess = Date.now();\n    return geom;\n  }\n  /** @return The {@link TilemapGeometry} shader that this rendering pipeline is using. */\n  getShader() {\n    return this.shader;\n  }\n  destroy() {\n    this.shader = null;\n  }\n  // eslint-disable-next-line no-unused-vars\n  checkIndexBuffer(size) {\n    const totalIndices = size * 6;\n    if (totalIndices <= this.ibLen) {\n      return;\n    }\n    this.ibLen = totalIndices;\n    this.indexBuffer.data = createIndicesForQuads(\n      size,\n      settings.use32bitIndex ? new Uint32Array(totalIndices) : new Uint16Array(totalIndices)\n    );\n  }\n  destroyRenderable(_renderable) {\n    _renderable.vb.destroy(true);\n    _renderable.vb = null;\n  }\n  addRenderable(tilemap, instructionSet) {\n    const batcher = this.renderer.renderPipes.batch;\n    tilemap.updateBuffer(this);\n    tilemap.checkValid();\n    tilemap.getTileset().update();\n    if (tilemap.is_valid) {\n      batcher.break(instructionSet);\n      instructionSet.add(tilemap._instruction);\n    }\n  }\n  updateRenderable(tilemap, _instructionSet) {\n    tilemap.updateBuffer(this);\n    tilemap.getTileset().update();\n  }\n  validateRenderable(renderable) {\n    return renderable.checkValid();\n  }\n  execute({ tilemap }) {\n    if (!tilemap.isRenderable)\n      return;\n    tilemap.state.blendMode = tilemap.groupBlendMode;\n    const { pipe_uniforms } = this.adaptor;\n    const u_proj_trans = pipe_uniforms.uniforms.u_proj_trans;\n    const u_global = this.renderer.globalUniforms._activeUniforms.at(-1).uniforms;\n    let anim_frame = this.tileAnim;\n    const { u_anim_frame } = pipe_uniforms.uniforms;\n    u_global.uProjectionMatrix.copyTo(u_proj_trans).append(u_global.uWorldTransformMatrix).append(tilemap.worldTransform);\n    if (tilemap.compositeParent) {\n      anim_frame = tilemap.parent.tileAnim || anim_frame;\n    }\n    u_anim_frame[0] = anim_frame[0];\n    u_anim_frame[1] = anim_frame[1];\n    pipe_uniforms.update();\n    this.adaptor.execute(this, tilemap);\n  }\n}\n__publicField(TilemapPipe, \"extension\", {\n  type: [\n    ExtensionType.WebGLPipes,\n    ExtensionType.WebGPUPipes\n  ],\n  name: \"tilemap\"\n});\nfunction createIndicesForQuads(size, outBuffer) {\n  const totalIndices = size * 6;\n  if (outBuffer.length !== totalIndices) {\n    throw new Error(`Out buffer length is incorrect, got ${outBuffer.length} and expected ${totalIndices}`);\n  }\n  for (let i = 0, j = 0; i < totalIndices; i += 6, j += 4) {\n    outBuffer[i + 0] = j + 0;\n    outBuffer[i + 1] = j + 1;\n    outBuffer[i + 2] = j + 2;\n    outBuffer[i + 3] = j + 0;\n    outBuffer[i + 4] = j + 2;\n    outBuffer[i + 5] = j + 3;\n  }\n  return outBuffer;\n}\n\nexport { TilemapAdaptor, TilemapPipe };\n//# sourceMappingURL=TilemapPipe.mjs.map\n","import { Buffer, BufferUsage, UniformGroup, Texture, BindGroup } from 'pixi.js';\n\nvar __defProp = Object.defineProperty;\nvar __defNormalProp = (obj, key, value) => key in obj ? __defProp(obj, key, { enumerable: true, configurable: true, writable: true, value }) : obj[key] = value;\nvar __publicField = (obj, key, value) => {\n  __defNormalProp(obj, typeof key !== \"symbol\" ? key + \"\" : key, value);\n  return value;\n};\nclass TileTextureArray {\n  constructor(max_textures) {\n    __publicField(this, \"max_textures\");\n    __publicField(this, \"arr\", []);\n    __publicField(this, \"count\", 0);\n    __publicField(this, \"dirty\", false);\n    __publicField(this, \"dirty_gpu\", false);\n    __publicField(this, \"bind_group\", null);\n    __publicField(this, \"bind_group_resources\", {});\n    __publicField(this, \"tex_sizes\", null);\n    __publicField(this, \"null_color\", new Float32Array([0, 0, 0, 0.5]));\n    __publicField(this, \"tex_buf\", null);\n    this.max_textures = max_textures;\n    this.tex_sizes = new Float32Array(this.max_textures * 4 + 4);\n    this.tex_buf = new Buffer({\n      usage: BufferUsage.UNIFORM | BufferUsage.COPY_DST\n    });\n  }\n  get length() {\n    return this.count;\n  }\n  push(tex) {\n    this.arr[this.count++] = tex;\n    this.dirty = true;\n  }\n  at(ind) {\n    return this.arr[ind];\n  }\n  update() {\n    if (!this.dirty) {\n      return;\n    }\n    this.dirty = false;\n    this.dirty_gpu = true;\n    const { tex_sizes, arr, count, max_textures, null_color } = this;\n    for (let i = 0; i < count;
